case.title: BECKLEY WATER CO. v. PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA

opinion.h: BECKLEY WATER CO. v. PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA, 286 U.S. 568 (1932)
BECKLEY WATER COMPANY, appellant, v. PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA et al. No. 857.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. A. A. Lilly, of Charleston, W. Va., for appellant.
Appeal from the Supreme Court of Appeals of W. Virginia, May 31st, 1932, Dismissed pursuant to Rule 12.[ Beckley Water Co v. Public Service Commission of West Virginia 286 U.S. 568 (1932) ]
